nasb.text: Now in the fourteenth year of King Hezekiah, Sennacherib king of Assyria came up against all the fortified cities of Judah and seized them.

esv.text: In the fourteenth year of King Hezekiah, Sennacherib king of Assyria came up against all the fortified cities of Judah and took them.

cnv.text: 希西家王十四年，亞述王西拿基立上來攻擊猶大所有的堅固城，並且把城攻取。

ccb.text: 希西迦王十四年，亚述王西拿基立率兵攻打犹大，攻陷所有的坚城。

csbs.text: 希西加王十四年，亚述王西纳基立上来攻击犹大所有坚固的城，并且攻取了它们。
